headline: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 is out in October, and it's coming to the Switch 2
summary: Activision confirms Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 launches October 23rd, 2026. Developed by Infinity Ward, it will be available on PS5, Xbox Series X/S, and PC. Notably, it's the first CoD title confirmed for the upcoming Nintendo Switch 2.

headline: The secret to Roku’s success: not being cool
summary: Roku found success by targeting a broader, less "cool" demographic. It focused on affordable hardware for mainstream consumers. This strategy allowed it to thrive against more trend-focused competitors.

headline: Waymo to begin passenger rides in its new Ojai robotaxi
summary: Waymo is launching passenger rides in its new "Ojai" robotaxi, a rebranded Zeekr RT minivan. Initial access will be for "select riders" in San Francisco, Los Angeles, and Phoenix. Trips will be free, with gradual expansion planned for more users and cities.

headline: This sound card could give gamers a competitive edge
summary: Fosi Audio unveiled the C3 Gaming Sound Card, designed for FPS players. It features StepSense "audio enhancement technology" trained on extensive FPS audio. The external USB-C sound card aims to provide a competitive advantage.

headline: The 10 Best Deals We Found in the PlayStation Days of Play Sale in the UK
summary: PlayStation's "Days of Play" sale is running in the UK until June 10. Offers include discounts on PS5 games, PS Plus subscriptions, and DualSense controllers. Gamers can also save on headsets and PSVR 2 hardware.

headline: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 Feels Like the First Truly Next-Gen Call of Duty – Multiplayer First Impressions
summary: First impressions suggest MW4 multiplayer feels truly next-gen. Infinity Ward capitalized on next-gen console capabilities, moving past last-gen limitations. The game feels like the vision Infinity Ward has been building towards for years.

headline: UFC 6 Hands-On Preview: Big and Small Changes Add Up to a Huge Improvement
summary: EA Sports UFC 6 shows significant improvements in a hands-on preview. Enhanced graphics, more satisfying striking, and distinct fighters via new Flow State mechanics. The new Hall of Legends offers a treat for UFC fans, showcasing classic moments and influential fighters.

headline: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 Revealed With DMZ, Release Date, and Nintendo Switch 2 Version Confirmed
summary: Activision officially unveiled Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4, set for release in late 2026. The new title confirms the return of the DMZ mode. A version for the unreleased Nintendo Switch 2 was also confirmed.

headline: Two more boys die in latest heatwave water deaths
summary: Two more boys tragically died in water-related incidents during a heatwave. One boy's body was recovered from a Kent pond. Another teenager drowned in the River Thames near Oxford.

headline: 'I've applied for more than 400 roles' - how young people are facing the job shortage
summary: Young people are facing significant challenges in the current job market. Many report applying for hundreds of roles with little success. The BBC highlights personal stories of those struggling to find work.

headline: Prostate cancer screening only for "a few thousand" high risk men
summary: UK advisors recommend prostate cancer screening only for a select group. Screening should target men with a dangerous genetic variant. A family history of cancer is also a criterion for eligibility.

headline: Starmer defends policy decisions as he hits back at Blair
summary: Keir Starmer defended Labour's policy decisions against criticism. Former Labour PM Tony Blair accused the government of lacking a "coherent plan." Starmer's response comes amidst internal and external pressures.
